name: chain_boring_tool_strategy_5kmo_path__tool
method: Boring tool strategy: $5K/mo path = tool that saves 4 hours/week. Find pain by scanning r/juststart, r/entrepreneur for "I spend hours every week on X". Build in <1 week. Validated: scoring 87/100 in

stages.task: Scan r/juststart, r/entrepreneur, r/SaaS, r/smallbusiness for posts matching patterns: 'I spend hours', 'waste time on', 'tedious', 'repetitive task', 'manual process', 'boring but necessary'. Extract the specific task, frequency, and any $ amounts mentioned.

Score each pain point: frequency (how many people mention it), intensity (frustration level 1-10), existing solutions (none=10, expensive=7, free=3), build complexity (can we ship in <1 week with app factory?). Filter to score >= 6.
For top-scored pain point, generate app factory spec: name, features, pricing ($9-29/mo), landing page copy, and queue into app_factory_autopilot.py
